none.justification: The enumerated pairs match the full 96-field GT list, including the tail after CONFIG_MESH and the bridge/TS/ACS/frequency fields, so it did not stop partway through the struct literal. It does contain an incorrect summary count of 89, but the actual listed field/function pairs are complete.

ccodegraph.justification: This answer gives the expected 96 function-pointer assignments, excludes .name/.desc, and covers the full struct literal through set_prob_oper_freq. The conditional-compilation note is slightly sloppy, but the scored field/function list matches the GT.

lsp.justification: The field/function list itself is complete and matches the same 96 assignments through the end of the literal, including the conditional TDLS/Android/MESH blocks and final tail fields. Its final statistic says 92 instead of 96, but that count error does not reflect an actual omission in the listed pairs.
